about.text: Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Create a Listing Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us X Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Contact Us About Edifice Properties Started with a casual conversation between three people having coffee at a cafe, talking about the development to overcome the housing deficit in Uganda aka The Pearl of Africa. Founded in 2022, EdificeProperties is Uganda’s design-led real estate developer and endeavours to craft beautiful properties and communities for high-quality lifestyles. A truly customer-centric developer in the Ugandan real estate market, we develop beautiful residences in Kampala designed by incredible artistry and impeccable architecture. Our customers’ refined tastes inspire us to create compelling luxury properties that consistently transcend fashions and trends. Every property is built on four key pillars which are change mindsets, establish credibility, evoke emotions and differentiation. We dream to build residences for people who truely apprciate design – from the first principles to the last detail Our Mission Innovate Affordably Develop high-quality, luxurious residential and commercial properties that leverage the latest in technology and architectural thinking, while remaining financially accessible to a broad market segment. Sustainability Commit to environmentally responsible building practices that minimize ecological impact and promote long-term sustainability, incorporating green technologies and renewable materials wherever possible Enhance Lifestyles Focus on properties that offer enhanced lifestyles through smart home features, community amenities, and wellness-focused designs. Customer Focus Maintain a steadfast focus on customer satisfaction and user experience, ensuring that all developments cater to the intricate needs and preferences of our clients. REDEFINING URBAN SPACES FOR FUTURE LIVING Beyond shaping skylines, Edifice is shaping futures. Dive into our world where architectural prowess meets nature, curating urban oases that redefine modern living REDEFINING GLOBAL SKYLINES At Edifice, we pride ourselves on redefining cityscapes across the globe. We’re not just about constructing iconic buildings; our vision transcends traditional boundaries. We aim to reshape the essence of urban living by creating self-contained micro-cities that flawlessly blend residential, commercial, and recreational spaces, delivering a comprehensive urban experience tailored for the modern individual. Luxury Get your dream house Get in touch with us and our experts and developers would love to contribute their expertise and insights and help you today. palazzo.text: Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Create a Listing Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us X Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Contact Us ELITE PALAZZO NAGURU PERFECT LOCATION Being an Elite resident means having the metropolis at your fingertips. At the crossroads of Naguru Ntinda II rd, Elite offers unparalleled connectivity. With efficient road networks, four entry-exit stations, and a nearest taxi to Downtown Kampala, ever destination is just moments away. Dive into the heart of Kampala, effortlessly connected within a 4 to 5 km radius MODERN ELEGANCE DESIGN Elite offers a variety of city-inspired residences. The elegant 1-bedroom units are perfect for individuals or couples. For the ultimate experience in city living, our 2- and 3-bedroom apartments present expansive layouts, large terraces, and locally + internationally sourced materials. 2 BHK Apartment Smart layout, elegant interiors, and peaceful surroundings $ 120,000 90 Sqm spacious living and dining area modern open-plan kitchen Click Here The 3-bedroom apartments at Elite Palazzo redefine luxury living with generous spaces and refined detailing throughout the home. These residences feature a large living and dining area, perfect for entertaining, a fully fitted modern kitchen, and three well-sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with an attached bathroom. Select units include private balconies offering scenic city or neighborhood views, creating a calm retreat within the city. 3 BHK Apartment Families seeking comfort, privacy, and long-term value $ 150,000 128 Sqm large living and dining area fully fitted modern kitchen three well-sized bedrooms private balconies Click Here Each home features a spacious living and dining area, large windows for natural light, and a modern open-plan kitchen with high-quality finishes. Both bedrooms are thoughtfully designed, with the master bedroom featuring an attached bathroom, while the second bedroom enjoys easy access to a well-appointed common washroom. homeownership.text: Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Create a Listing Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us X Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Contact Us Home ownership Guide Essential information, maintenance tips, and answers to common queries for Edifice Properties homeowners. We're here to support you long after you receive your keys arrow-icon-down Common Queries What is covered under the warranty? Our comprehensive warranty covers structural defects, major building systems (plumbing, electrical, HVAC), and workmanship issues for a period of 12 months from handover. This includes foundation, walls, roof, windows, doors, and all installed fixtures. Cosmetic issues and normal wear and tear are not covered. How do I report maintenance issues? Contact our property management team via phone, email, or through our online portal. For emergencies (water leaks, electrical failures, security issues), call our 24/7 hotline. For non-urgent matters, submit a maintenance request through your homeowner portal, and we'll respond within 48 hours. What are the monthly service charges? Service charges cover common area maintenance, security, landscaping, waste management, and shared utilities. Charges vary by property size and development but typically range from 2-4% of the property value annually, billed monthly. Detailed breakdowns are provided in your homeowner agreement. Can I make modifications to my property? Minor interior modifications (painting, fixtures, flooring) are generally permitted. Major structural changes, exterior modifications, or changes affecting common areas require written approval from property management. Submit modification requests with detailed plans for review. What insurance do I need? We recommend comprehensive home insurance covering building structure, contents, liability, and natural disasters. The development maintains master insurance for common areas and building exteriors. Individual unit owners should insure their interiors, belongings, and personal liability. View Course How do I transfer or sell my property? Contact our sales team to initiate the transfer process You'll need to clear all outstanding service charges, obtain a clearance certificate, and complete legal documentation. We can assist with finding buyers and connecting you with legal professionals for the transfer process. What about property management and security? All Edifice Properties developments have professional property management and 24/7 security. This includes CCTV surveillance, access control, security personnel, and regular patrols. Property management handles maintenance coordination, vendor management, and community administration. Are there community rules and regulations? Yes, each development has community guidelines covering noise levels, parking, pet policies, waste disposal, and use of common facilities. These rules ensure a harmonious living environment for all residents. How to Launch a Successful Online Community 5 lessons - 4:11 hours View Course Maintenance Tips Keep your property in excellent condition with these essential maintenance practices Plumbing Check for leaks regularly under sinks and around toilets Clean drain traps monthly to prevent clogs Don't flush non-biodegradable items Test water pressure and report any significant changes Electrical Test circuit breakers and GFCI outlets quarterly Replace light bulbs with energy-efficient LED alternatives Never overload electrical outlets or extension cords Schedule professional inspection every 3-5 years Keep electrical panels accessible and clearly labeled HVAC & Ventilation Clean or replace AC filters every 1-3 months Schedule professional AC servicing twice yearly Keep vents and air returns unobstructed Check for proper ventilation in bathrooms and kitchen Monitor humidity levels to prevent mold growth Interior Maintenance Touch up paint and repair minor wall damage promptly Clean windows and check seals for air leaks Inspect and maintain door locks and hinges Deep clean carpets and upholstery annually Check for signs of pest activity and address immediately Property Care Services and stay ahead of your competitors 24/7 Emergency Support Round-the-clock assistance for urgent maintenance issues including plumbing emergencies, electrical failures, and security concerns. Scheduled Maintenance Regular preventive maintenance services for common areas, building systems, and shared facilities to ensure optimal performance. Approved Contractors Access our network of vetted contractors and service providers for repairs, renovations, and specialized maintenance work. Give us a call +256786000112 About This luxury high-rise community provides its residents with sophisticated and trendy apartment features, extravagant and resort-style amenities at a very cost effective price. specifications.text: Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Create a Listing Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us X Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Home Properties Horizon Residency Embassy Towers Elite Pallazo Atlantic Apartments Urban View Apartments Buying Process Home ownership About Us Contact Us The Buying Process Your journey to home ownership with Edifice Properties is designed to be seamless, transparent, and rewarding. We guide you through every step with expertise and care. 7 Simple Steps Initial Consultation Meet with our property consultants to discuss your requirements, budget, and preferred locations. We'll help you understand available options and payment plans. Property Selection Tour our developments and select your ideal unit. Our team will provide detailed specifications, floor plans, and pricing information for your chosen property. Exclusive Site Visit Join us for a free guided site visit to explore our premium projects including Embassy Towers, Horizon Residency, Atlantic Heights, and Urban View Apartments. Reservation Secure your property with a reservation fee. We'll provide you with a reservation agreement and begin the documentation process. Financial Arrangement Finalize your payment plan or mortgage arrangement. Our financial advisors can connect you with trusted banking partners for competitive financing options. Legal Documentation Complete all legal requirements including sale agreements, title verification, and registration. Our legal team ensures all documentation is properly executed. Handover Receive your keys and complete the handover process. We'll conduct a final walkthrough and provide you with all necessary documentation and warranties. Financing Options Multiple pathways to make your dream home a reality Flexible Payment Plans Choose from various payment schedules tailored to your financial situation. Options include installment plans over 12, 24, or 36 months with competitive terms. • Initial deposit: 20-30% • Flexible installment periods • No hidden charges • Early payment discounts available Mortgage Financing Partner with leading banks and financial institutions offering competitive mortgage rates. We assist with the entire application process. • Up to 90% financing available • Competitive interest rates • Loan tenure up to 25 years • Pre-approval assistance Corporate Packages Special arrangements for corporate clients and bulk purchases. Customized payment structures for organizations and investment groups. • Volume discounts • Customized payment terms • Dedicated account management • Investment advisory services Legal Requirements Everything you need to know about documentation and legal processes Required Documentation ✓ Valid national ID or passport ✓ Proof of income (employment letter or business registration) ✓ Bank statements (last 3-6 months) ✓ Tax identification number (TIN) ✓ Passport-size photographs ✓ Marriage certificate (if applicable) Legal Process ✓ Sale agreement preparation and signing ✓ Title search and verification ✓ Stamp duty payment ✓ Property registration with land registry ✓ Transfer of ownership documentation ✓ Issuance of certificate of title Protection & Guarantees ✓ Clear and marketable title guarantee ✓ Structural warranty coverage ✓ Defects liability period ✓ Legal indemnity insurance ✓ Compliance with building regulations ✓ Environmental clearance certificates Legal Support Our in-house legal team and trusted partners guide you through every legal requirement. We ensure all documentation is properly prepared, verified, and registered according to local regulations. Your investment is protected at every stage of the process. Give us a call +256786000112 About This luxury high-rise community provides its residents with sophisticated and trendy apartment features, extravagant and resort-style amenities at a very cost effective price.
